prompt: Cinematic single shot, 4 seconds. Start lit, end dark. Time-coded motion: 0-1s: a thin pale curl of steam rises actively from the ceramic mug, drifting slightly leftward in the warm air; the lamp burns at full warmth. 1-3s: the warm tungsten desk lamp dims smoothly and continuously, the warm pool of light on the wall of pinned index cards fades, the cards recede into deep navy shadow, the steam thins and fades as the warmth leaves. 3-4s: the lamp is off, the scene rests in cool dim darkness with the cards as silhouettes, the lamp body still visible at camera-right with a faint cool moonlight rim. Locked-off camera, no pan, no zoom, no cuts. No flicker, no electrical strobe, no chimney-thick smoke. Real photographic motion, filmic. No text, no logos, no words. One smooth continuous dim and out, like an operator pressing the switch and walking out.
